case_title: SAMAR LIGHTFOOT VS. DANTE MANCINI ET AL

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF SEP-04-2015 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $4,537.89 FILED BY LIGHTFOOT, SAMAR AS TO DEFENDANT MANCINI, DANTE LAMANCE, MARIA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUN-22-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-22-2015 - CONTINUED TO CURE UNTIMELY SERVICE ON DEFENDANT DANTE MANCINI TO JUL-16-2015 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT MARIA LAMANCE WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT TODAYS HEARING. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF LIGHTFOOT, SAMAR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MANCINI, DANTE LAMANCE, MARIA $1,923.60 PRINCIPAL, $195.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,118.60 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $72.50) SERVED MAY-27-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT LAMANCE, MARIA

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-16-2015 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO SEP-04-2015 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. JUDGE PRO TEM: DAVID FLEISIG. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT MANCINI, DANTE LAMANCE, MARIA
RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO PLAINTIFF RETURNED = RETURN TO SENDER, NO SUCH STREET, UNABLE TO FORWARD
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $72.50) SERVED MAY-27-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT MANCINI, DANTE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF SEP-04-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF SEP-04-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFFS WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANTS (2) WERE PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
